metadata.title: Magnetar dev - Personal portfolio website on NextJS | Portfolio work
metadata.description: My personal portfolio website on NextJS and TypeScript with multilingual support and SEO optimization.

mysite.info: <title>Magnetar's website</title><stackCard></stackCard><fullWidthImage>/magnetar-site/img/mysite/main_page.png</fullWidthImage><paragraph>My portfolio website. Built with NextJS, TypeScript and styled with TailwindCSS.</paragraph><paragraph>The design has support for different contrast levels, allowing people with specific color perception to interact with the site. The site is also localized into different languages and has well-implemented SEO.</paragraph>
